name: toggle-group-single
visual_summary: A toggle-group-single is a compact group of toggle buttons that can be used in settings, preferences or configuration pages. It's a suitable choice when 2-4 options need to be presented to the user. The user can interact with it by clicking on the individual toggle buttons to select or deselect the option.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready button component with the following characteristics:

Name: toggle-group-single
Description: A toggle-group-single is a compact group of toggle buttons that can be used in settings, preferences or configuration pages. It's a suitable choice when 2-4 options need to be presented to the user. The user can interact with it by clicking on the individual toggle buttons to select or deselect the option.
Style: e.g. material
Interactions: e.g. clickable, toggable
Tags: toggle, button, settings, preferences, configuration

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
